objective: Teach MedGemma to visually identify Nasi Padang, a composite Indonesian-Malay rice dish with multiple side dishes including beef rendang, sayur lodeh, and sambal goreng, in authentic hawker centre contexts and recognize its key ingredients, textures, and preparation styles.

hero_product: photorealistic plate of Nasi Padang with steamed jasmine rice, beef rendang, sayur lodeh, and sambal goreng served in Singapore hawker centre
close-up of Nasi Padang mixed rice Malay style with multiple side dishes on a white plate
traditional Indonesian Minangkabau rice dish Nasi Padang with beef rendang and vegetable curry in hawker food court setting
macro_texture: texture detail of beef rendang dry-spiced coconut beef curry with thick gravy
close-up of sayur lodeh coconut vegetable curry showing mixed vegetables in creamy coconut milk
fried sambal goreng tempeh with crispy texture and spicy red chili sambal coating
raw_ingredients_and_process: steamed jasmine rice mound on plate for Nasi Padang
raw tempeh blocks before frying for sambal goreng
beef chunks stewing in rendang dry spice and coconut milk sauce
mixed vegetables simmering in sayur lodeh coconut curry
traditional Indonesian spice pastes and belacan shrimp paste used in Nasi Padang preparation
in_the_wild_context: Nasi Padang stall with trays of pre-cooked dishes in Singapore Malay hawker centre
diner selecting side dishes at Nasi Padang food stall in West Sumatra Indonesia
Malay food court serving Nasi Padang plates during lunch hour
Hari Raya festive meal featuring Nasi Padang dishes on dining table
culinary_application: Nasi Padang served as daily lunch meal in Singapore hawker centre
traditional Indonesian Minangkabau style Nasi Padang with beef rendang and vegetable sides
mixed rice Malay style meal with steamed rice and assorted spicy side dishes
label_truth: close-up of Nasi Padang dish showing visible tempeh pieces indicating soy allergen
Nasi Padang plate highlighting reddish sambal goreng containing belacan shrimp paste allergen
photorealistic Nasi Padang plate showing typical high sodium sauces and coconut milk gravy
